Open Water Lab (OWL)
====================


Open Water Lab (OWL) is a free and open-source ecosystem of tools for water system modelling, simulation, and analysis.

It is part of the broader activities of the
`BIOMATH research group <https://github.com/UGentBiomath>`_
at Ghent University, Belgium.
